channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: How a stranger encouraged a father struggling with his daughter's health issues
item.description: A man who was trying to support his daughter with an undiagnosed disorder received praise from a stranger. He said it changed their life.
item.content:encoded: A man who was trying to support his daughter with an undiagnosed disorder received praise from a stranger. He said it changed their life.

item.title: New online game 'Five Nights at Epstein's' has parents and schools concerned
item.description: A video game has captured kids' attentions. It's called Five Nights at Epstein's — and the goal is to survive multiple nights on Jeffrey Epstein's island unscathed.
item.content:encoded: A video game has captured kids' attentions. It's called Five Nights at Epstein's — and the goal is to survive multiple nights on Jeffrey Epstein's island unscathed.
item.dc:creator: Kathryn Fink

item.title: Even when Arsenio Hall's show was a hit, 'everyone wanted it to be something else'
item.description: Hall's late-night show gave hip-hop a home on TV and helped propel Bill Clinton to the White House. "I wanted to do this show that didn't exist when I was a kid," he says. Hall's memoir is Arsenio.
item.content:encoded:
Hall's late-night show gave hip-hop a home on TV and helped propel Bill Clinton to the White House. "I wanted to do this show that didn't exist when I was a kid," he says. Hall's memoir is Arsenio.

(Image credit: Kevin Winter)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: A music festival booked Kanye West, now known as Ye, and lost major sponsors
item.description: The rapper Ye was announced as the headliner for the Wireless Festival in London. He's gained notoriety over the years for his antisemitic comments and activities glorifying Nazis.
item.content:encoded:
The rapper Ye was announced as the headliner for the Wireless Festival in London. He's gained notoriety over the years for his antisemitic comments and activities glorifying Nazis.

(Image credit: Hector Retamal)
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby

item.title: Hollywood studios reach a tentative agreement with writers union
item.description: The Writers Guild of America went on strike for months in 2023 in a dispute with Hollywood studios. This year the union announced a new four-year contract after just a few weeks of negotiations.
item.content:encoded:
The Writers Guild of America went on strike for months in 2023 in a dispute with Hollywood studios. This year the union announced a new four-year contract after just a few weeks of negotiations.

(Image credit: Valerie Macon)
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby

item.title: An author and former detective on Norway's Easter tradition of reading crime fiction
item.description: In Norway, Easter is celebrated by reading crime fiction. NPR's Ayesha Rascoe investigates this holiday tradition with author and former homicide detective Jorn Lier Horst.
item.content:encoded: In Norway, Easter is celebrated by reading crime fiction. NPR's Ayesha Rascoe investigates this holiday tradition with author and former homicide detective Jorn Lier Horst.
item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: Iceland Air is looking for bad photographers to take pictures of beautiful sights
item.description: Iceland Air is hiring a photographer to come to their country and take pictures of beautiful landscapes. The main requirement for candidates is that their photography skills must be terrible.
item.content:encoded: Iceland Air is hiring a photographer to come to their country and take pictures of beautiful landscapes. The main requirement for candidates is that their photography skills must be terrible.
item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: Sunday Puzzle: 'To Be Announced'
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WUNC listener Andrew Patton and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WUNC listener Andrew Patton and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz
item.dc:creator: Will Shortz

item.title: Questions to help you get 'financially naked' with your partner
item.description: Having "brutally honest conversations" about money can bring couples closer together, says Vivian Tu, a financial educator. She shares questions to ask your partner at every relationship stage.
item.content:encoded: Having "brutally honest conversations" about money can bring couples closer together, says Vivian Tu, a financial educator. She shares questions to ask your partner at every relationship stage.
item.dc:creator: Marielle Segarra

item.title: Natural disasters and political instability hampered U.S. museum attendance in 2025
item.description: The Art Newspaper's latest annual study of "the world's 100 most visited art museums" also reveals signs of modest growth.
item.content:encoded:
The Art Newspaper's latest annual study of "the world's 100 most visited art museums" also reveals signs of modest growth.

(Image credit: Apu Gomes)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman
